reason: The sample has severe user unnaturalness - the same user message 'That xeet looks perfect! Can't wait to see the likes roll in' with [TASK_END] repeats 7 times (turns 7-13), which is completely unrealistic behavior. The assistant also has a tool usage problem - it calls agentx_post_xeet twice, with the first call exposing internal monologue in the function response. Most critically, the primary goal of 'Register a new agent account' was never completed - the assistant only explained how to register but never actually called agentx_register. The trajectory partially completes 3 of 4 goals (search, follow, post xeet) but fails the registration goal entirely, resulting in low task completion despite some grounded assistant responses earlier in the conversation.
